data.description: In addition, you use Charisma whenever spellcasting ability. The spell save DC and spell attack modifier for paladin spells are as follows: Spell save DC = 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier; Spell attack modifier = your proficiency bonus + your Charisma modifier.
Starting at 10th level, friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be frightened if you are conscious. At 18th level, the range of this aura increases to 30 feet.

By 11th level, your Sacred Oath grants you Improved Divine Smite. When you hit a creature with a melee weapon attack, that creature takes an extra d8 radiant damage. If you also use Divine Smite on the same attack, add this damage to the damage of your Divine Smite.
